label: Declarative schema (db_schema.xml)
postNote: Declarative schema over install/upgrade scripts (commerce/declarative-schema). The <table> is merged into an existing db_schema.xml (idempotent, deduped by table name); a new file is created with the schema root if absent. Apply: bin/magento setup:upgrade. Generate the whitelist: bin/magento setup:db-declaration:generate-whitelist --module-name=${vendor}_${module}.
